---
pagetitle: "NBA Team Elo Ratings | Above .500"
---

```{python}
#| output: asis
from above500 import render
from above500.nba import elo
from html import escape

f = elo.forecast()

print(f'<span class="kicker">{escape(f["league"])}</span>')
print(f'<h1 class="headline">{escape(f["name"])}</h1>')
print(f'<p class="dek">{escape(f["description"])}</p>')
print(render.byline(f))
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
print(render.season_picker_table(
    leaderboards=f["leaderboards"],
    seasons=f["all_seasons"],
    default_season=f["last_season"],
    columns=[
        {"key": "name", "kind": "team", "label": "Team"},
        {"key": "rating", "kind": "num", "label": "Elo"},
        {"key": "change", "kind": "signed", "label": "Season Δ", "hide_sm": True},
        {"key": "history", "kind": "spark", "label": "Trend", "hide_sm": True},
        {"key": "rs_record", "kind": "text", "label": "Regular Season"},
        {"key": "po_record", "kind": "text", "label": "Playoffs"},
        {"key": "record", "kind": "text", "label": "Overall"},
    ],
    title="Elo Ratings",
    note=f"Elo ratings · through {f['data_through']}",
    widget_id="elo",
    show_type_toggle=False,
    default_sort_key="rating",
    note_prefix="Elo ratings",
))
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
print(render.games_section(f, "upcoming", "Upcoming games",
                           "Win probability from Elo ratings"))
print(render.games_section(f, "final", "Latest games",
                           f"Through {f['data_through']} — forecast vs. outcome"))
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
print('<details class="model-performance">')
print('<summary>Model performance &amp; backtest</summary>')
print(render.backtest_models_table(f["backtest"]))
print(render.calibration_table(f["backtest"]))
print(render.decades_table(f["backtest"]))
print('</details>')
print(render.methodology_box(f))
```
